name: taskflow-monorepo
description: TaskFlow Kanban board task manager MERN application

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.kill:ports: powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000,5173,5174 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | Where-Object { $_ -gt 0 } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'Ports cleared'"
scripts.dev: npm run kill:ports && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "SERVER,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm start --prefix server" "npm run build --prefix client"

author: Antigravity
